violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. A freezer has duct tape holding it together.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when coming into the kitchen from the outside.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. A tub of chicken was thawing on the counter.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The chest freezer lid is being held together with duct tape.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
